title: SmartEX
description: SmartEX — Realistic explosion physics and TNT stacking.
body:
SmartEX is a mod that completely reimagines how explosions work in Minecraft. Forget about boring blocks simply vanishing. Now, every TNT detonation is a physics-based event packed with stunning visual effects.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-xyIi3RKFIs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Key Features:

Real Debris Physics: Blocks turn into flying projectiles. They rotate and scatter based on the explosion's force.

Visual Shockwaves: See the air distort and ripple the moment a detonation occurs.

Immersive Impact: Realistic camera shake that scales based on your distance from the blast.

TNT Stacking System: Clumps of TNT merge into a single, massive explosion to prevent lag.

Volumetric Smoke: Thick, realistic smoke plumes linger after every bang.

Information:

Platform: Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)

Author: Tarubi_

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@taburetka_1
